Sonata - Swords & Darkness Character Builder

Create and customize characters according to the Open Game License 2nd Edition rules.

⚠️ Rule Validation Warnings:
  • At character creation, Fighters must spend at least 3 SP on Combat/Weapon Skills.

Identity

Ancestry

Size: Medium

Movement Speed: 12 m

Racial Score Adjustments:None

Racial Traits:

  • Primary class reassignment (once per lifetime)

Ability Scores Generation

Remaining Points: 30

Start at 8, distribute 30 points. Cost increases above 15 (15->16 costs 2, 16->17 costs 3, 17->18 costs 4).

Strong save: +1 per 4 levels · Weak save: +1 per 8 levels · Roll d20 under score to succeed.

MOVEMENT

BASE RATE: 12 m
LIGHT: 12
MODERATE: —
HEAVY: —
SEVERE: —
PORTRAIT

SPECIAL ABILITIES / ATTACKS

  • Primary class reassignment (once per lifetime)
  • Weapon Specialization (Fighters only; +1 attack, +2 damage for 2 SP)
  • Multiple Attacks (Iterative attacks as level increases)
  • Combat Maneuvers (Unrestricted access)

WEAPON & COMBAT

WEAPON#ATATK ADJDMG ADJATK BONUSDAM (S-M/L)RANGEWEIGHTSIZETYPESPEEDINIT
            
            
            
Initiative = d10 + 10 - Weapon Speed • High roll acts first | Attack Roll: d20 + Attack Bonus + Modifiers >= target AC
